languages.text: {n}Ваш удар тонет в зеленой вспышке, не нанося металлическому ксеносу ни малейшего урона. Озаренные тошнотворным противоестественным светом руки начинают немного неметь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ваш удар тонет в зеленой вспышке, не нанося металлическому ксеносу ни малейшего урона. Озаренные тошнотворным противоестественным светом руки начинают немного неметь.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Your strike drowns in a flash of green, not harming the metal xenos in the slightest. Your hands, bathed in the nauseating unnatural light, begin to feel a little numb.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваш удар тонет в зеленой вспышке, не нанося металлическому ксеносу ни малейшего урона. Озаренные тошнотворным противоестественным светом руки начинают немного неметь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your strike drowns in a flash of green, not harming the metal xenos in the slightest. Your hands, bathed in the nauseating unnatural light, begin to feel a little numb.{/n}
{n}Your strike drowns in a flash of green, not harming the metal xenos in the slightest. Your hands, bathed in the nauseating unnatural light, begin to feel a little numb.{/n}
{n}Your strike drowns in a flash of green, not harming the metal xenos in the slightest. Your hands, bathed in the nauseating unnatural light, begin to feel a little numb.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的攻击淹没在一道绿色闪光中，丝毫没能伤到那个金属异形。你的双手被那令人作呕的诡异光芒浸染，逐渐开始发麻。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your strike drowns in a flash of green, not harming the metal xenos in the slightest. Your hands, bathed in the nauseating unnatural light, begin to feel a little numb.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的攻击淹没在一道绿色闪光中，丝毫没能伤到那个金属异形。你的双手被那令人作呕的诡异光芒浸染，逐渐开始发麻。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu ataque se hunde en un destello verde, sin causar ni un rasguño al xenos metálico. Tus manos, bañadas en la nauseabunda luz antinatural, empiezan a adormecerse.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your strike drowns in a flash of green, not harming the metal xenos in the slightest. Your hands, bathed in the nauseating unnatural light, begin to feel a little numb.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu ataque se hunde en un destello verde, sin causar ni un rasguño al xenos metálico. Tus manos, bañadas en la nauseabunda luz antinatural, empiezan a adormecerse.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une vive lumière verte absorbe le coup que vous avez porté, et celui-ci ne laisse pas la moindre trace sur le métal xénos. Vos mains, baignées dans cette lumière nauséeuse, artificielle, commencent à s'engourdir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your strike drowns in a flash of green, not harming the metal xenos in the slightest. Your hands, bathed in the nauseating unnatural light, begin to feel a little numb.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une vive lumière verte absorbe le coup que vous avez porté, et celui-ci ne laisse pas la moindre trace sur le métal xénos. Vos mains, baignées dans cette lumière nauséeuse, artificielle, commencent à s'engourdir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vuruşun, metalik zenolara en ufak bir zarar bile vermeden yeşil bir parıltı içinde boğuluyor. Mide bulandırıcı doğaüstü ışıkta yıkanan ellerin, hafifçe uyuşmaya başlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your strike drowns in a flash of green, not harming the metal xenos in the slightest. Your hands, bathed in the nauseating unnatural light, begin to feel a little numb.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vuruşun, metalik zenolara en ufak bir zarar bile vermeden yeşil bir parıltı içinde boğuluyor. Mide bulandırıcı doğaüstü ışıkta yıkanan ellerin, hafifçe uyuşmaya başlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dein Schlag ertrinkt in einem grünen Blitz, ohne dem metallenen Xenos auch nur einen Kratzer zuzufügen. Deine Hände fühlen sich in dem widerlichen, unnatürlichen Licht taub an.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your strike drowns in a flash of green, not harming the metal xenos in the slightest. Your hands, bathed in the nauseating unnatural light, begin to feel a little numb.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dein Schlag ertrinkt in einem grünen Blitz, ohne dem metallenen Xenos auch nur einen Kratzer zuzufügen. Deine Hände fühlen sich in dem widerlichen, unnatürlichen Licht taub an.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの一撃は緑の閃光に呑み込まれ、金属の異種族をいささかも傷つけられない。むかつくような不自然な光を浴びたあなたの手が、わずかに痺れ始める。{/n}
